General Checklist

[ ] I have searched for similar existing feature requests.

[ ] This is a request for a new feature, not a bug report.

What is the problem or need?

Briefly describe the problem you are facing (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...").

Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to happen and how it should work.

Alternatives (Optional)

Briefly mention any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.
